name: Ultraman Chronicle: ZERO & GEED
original_name: ウルトラマン クロニクル ZERO&GEED
overview: Ultraman Chronicle Zero & Geed is a biography series produced by Tsuburaya Productions created to commemorate the 10th anniversary of Ultraman Zero. Featuring Riku Asakura, who navigates the viewers through compilation clips featuring Zero's appearances throughout past shows, in addition to Riku's exploits as Ultraman Geed.

trailers.title: Ultraman Chronicle Zero & Geed Opening (Eng Subs)
